CREATE TABLE TestNumbers (A INT, B INT);
SELECT A, B, A / B AS Result FROM TestNumbers WHERE B <> 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TestNumbers WHERE B = 0;
SELECT (SELECT A FROM TestNumbers WHERE A = 15) / (SELECT B FROM TestNumbers WHERE B = 3) AS SubqueryResult;
SELECT T1.A, T1.B, T1.A / T2.B AS DivisionResult FROM TestNumbers T1 JOIN TestNumbers T2 ON T1.A = 10 AND T2.B = 2;
SELECT A, B, CASE WHEN B = 0 THEN NULL ELSE A / B END AS SafeDivision FROM TestNumbers;
